description_long: This is a rectangular granite grave with a raised headstone at one end, inscribed with the large black letters 'RIP'. The headstone is arched at the top and sits on a two-tiered granite base, giving it a solid and dignified appearance. The main grave slab is flat and features a single orange flower motif, adding a touch of color and symbolism to the otherwise gray stone. The granite surface is speckled with lighter and darker shades, typical of polished stone, and the edges are sharply defined. The back of the headstone is plain, with no visible inscriptions or decorations. The overall construction suggests durability and permanence, suitable for an urban cemetery or memorial park.
description: A rectangular granite grave with an arched headstone inscribed 'RIP' and a single orange flower motif on the slab, featuring a polished, speckled stone surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched headstone with 'RIP' inscription and the orange flower motif on the grave slab.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the granite slab and the layered base of the headstone.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back of the headstone and the layered granite base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the grave slab and the orange flower motif, with the headstone in profile.
